channel.title: FilmyChill — New Movies & OTT This Week in Australia
channel.description: What's worth watching this week in Australia — new theatre and OTT releases with ratings and verdicts. Updated twice daily.

item.title: Saga of Tanya the Evil — Crunchyroll
item.description: Crunchyroll · Japanese · ★ 8.2 · Must watch — On the front lines of the war, Tanya Degurechaff, blond hair, blue eyes, and porcelain white skin, commands her squad with lisping voice.

item.title: Human Vapor — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Japanese · ★ 7.8 · Must watch — A death on live TV. A culprit who turns to gas. Behind it, a secret project that used and discarded the vulnerable. One detective pursues the dark truth.

item.title: Widow's Bay — Apple TV
item.description: Apple TV · English · ★ 8.2 · Must watch — The mayor of a New England town resolves to turn it into the next tourist hot spot, despite local warnings that it's cursed.

item.title: Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Japanese · ★ 8.5 · Must watch — When a 34-year-old underachiever gets run over by a truck, his story doesn't end there. Reincarnated in a new world as an infant, Rudy will seize every…

item.title: Silo — Apple TV
item.description: Apple TV · English · ★ 8.2 · Must watch — In a ruined and toxic future, thousands live in a giant silo deep underground. After its sheriff breaks a cardinal rule and residents die mysteriously,…

item.title: X-Men '97 — Disney Plus
item.description: Disney Plus · English · ★ 8.6 · Must watch — The X-Men, a band of mutants who use their uncanny gifts to protect a world that hates and fears them, are challenged like never before, forced to face a…

item.title: Elle — Amazon Prime Video
item.description: Amazon Prime Video · English · ★ 8.0 · Must watch — Before Elle Woods was a fish-out-of-water at Harvard, we meet her in 1995 in the tumultuous waters of high school where she encounters tricky friendships,…

item.title: Enola Holmes 3 — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · English · ★ 7.0 · Worth a watch — Adventure follows detective Enola Holmes to Malta, where her plans to tie the knot unravel when Sherlock's disappearance plunges her into a perilous case.

item.title: The Bear — Disney Plus
item.description: Disney Plus · English · ★ 8.1 · Must watch — Carmy, a young fine-dining chef, comes home to Chicago to run his family sandwich shop. As he fights to transform the shop and himself, he works alongside a…

item.title: Supergirl — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 6.2 · Decent one-time watch — When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an…

item.title: Minions & Monsters — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 6.4 · Decent one-time watch — This is the rambunctious, ridiculous and totally true story of how the Minions conquered Hollywood, became movie stars, lost everything, unleashed monsters…

item.title: House of the Dragon — Foxtel Now
item.description: Foxtel Now · English · ★ 8.4 · Must watch — The Targaryen dynasty is at the absolute apex of its power, with more than 15 dragons under their yoke. Most empires crumble from such heights.

item.title: Voicemails for Isabelle — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 8.4 · Must watch — A young woman's hilariously confessional voicemails to her late sister are unknowingly redirected to a stranger, who begins to fall in love from afar.

item.title: Citizen Vigilante — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 6.6 · Worth a watch — A man takes justice into his own hands, hunting down criminals. His vigilante crusade makes him a social media star but puts him at odds with the local police…

item.title: Dear You — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · Chinese · ★ 9.2 · Must watch — Xiaowei travels to Thailand to find his "billionaire grandfather" who is out of contact due to debt problems, but unexpectedly find the one who has been…

item.title: Good Boy — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 7.1 · Worth a watch — Tommy, a volatile 19-year-old, revels in drugs, parties and violence. After getting separated from his friends on a drunken bender, he is abducted by a shadowy…
